since_last: 42% of 84 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.15%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.19% · Gold -0.13% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 42% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.15%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.15%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.66%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +2.61%, NOW +2.37%, SAP +1.87%, CRM +1.65%, CRWD +1.52%. Laggards: MU -5.66%, ZBRA -5.23%, MRVL -4.99%, LRCX -4.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.68% at $159.32
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
